boundary_companions.authz_rbac: member POST /api/tenants (and 4 other management endpoints) -> 403; admin/operator pass (lib/auth.ts:245)
boundary_companions.idor_impersonation: registration/identity forced to caller; another user's id cannot be acted as (resolveEventRegistrationUserId, app/api/event-registrations/route.ts:66)
boundary_companions.visibility_scope: members-scope consultation not leaked to lower role; unauth top hides protected nav (components/ninno-product-app.tsx:60)
boundary_companions.idempotency: same idempotencyKey re-send -> duplicate:true, no double write (app/api/integrations/openab/slack/route.ts:67)
boundary_companions.allowlist_boundary: disallowed teamDomain -> 403 Slack workspace is not allowed (lib/auth.ts:255)

Full 3-role x 6-surface dogfood report, per-interaction console/network sweep, repro steps, and severity/category taxonomy: https://github.com/bonginkan/NINNO-real-product/issues/45
All three GUI REDs fixed in PR #64 and re-verified on dev: https://github.com/bonginkan/NINNO-real-product/pull/64

red_findings.summary: Member first-time event registration without a tenant link returned an unhandled 500 (undefined tenantId/note written to Firestore .set, no route try/catch).
red_findings.repro: POST /api/event-registrations without tenantId (first time) -> 500; with tenantId or existing registration -> 201 (app/api/event-registrations/route.ts:30)

red_findings.summary: The login page prefetched the Slack OAuth redirect as a fetch and emitted net::ERR_INVALID_REDIRECT on load (medium, console/errors).
red_findings.repro: GET /login in an isolated unauthenticated browser context; the console/network recorded the failed OAuth-authorize fetch while top-level sign-in navigation still worked (https://github.com/bonginkan/NINNO-real-product/issues/61).

red_findings.summary: A member could mount the management dashboard shell, triggering admin-only API requests that returned 403 (medium, ux/console-errors).
red_findings.repro: GET /dashboard with a member session; the dogfood pass recorded GET /api/admin-analytics and GET /api/support-tickets returning 403 before the render-time role clamp was added.

red_findings.summary: The deployed application returned 404 for /favicon.ico (low, content/polish).
red_findings.repro: GET /favicon.ico on the pre-fix dev deployment returned 404; PR #64 added the literal icon route and the post-fix probe returned 200.

residue.evidence: Firestore re-query after cleanup returned 0 across consultations/integrationEvents/outcomeLogs/users/test-users (verified post-run; see https://github.com/bonginkan/NINNO-real-product/pull/44)

evidence_refs: admin dashboard screenshots: openab-consultation-panel.png, openab-outcome-panel.png, openab-decision-panel.png

safety.secret_handling: Authenticated surfaces were reached by minting a ninno_session from the app's own HMAC signing secret read as raw bytes (preserving the exact byte length, since shell capture would strip a trailing newline and break the signature). The secret value is never recorded in this ledger.
